questions.q: How is an Awareness campaign measured?
options: Reach, frequency and estimated ad recall lift
questions.explanation: Awareness doesn't optimize for clicks or sales; its metric is recall and efficient reach.

options: How many conversions would NOT have happened without the ads
Which creative has the higher CTR
questions.explanation: Incrementality = causal effect; it's measured with a holdout (control) group.

questions.q: To measure changes in recall and purchase intent for a brand campaign:
questions.explanation: Brand Lift measures brand metrics (recall, awareness, intent) via survey between exposed and control groups.

questions.q: Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) is used to:
options: Daily tactical optimization of an ad set
See the aggregate impact of all channels (online/offline) at a macro level
questions.explanation: MMM models the macro contribution of all channels; attribution only sees digital touchpoints.

options: Changes which conversions are credited to Meta, without changing the real sales
questions.explanation: The window defines the reported credit; the real sales don't change. You have to communicate this to the client.
